sources.title: Samsung and POSTECH Publish 2D/3D Switchable Display Research in Nature
sources.excerpt: Samsung Electronics and POSTECH have published a research paper titled “Switchable 2D-3D display through a metasurface lenticular lens” in the prestigious journal Nature, marking notable progress in next-generation display technology through industry-academia collaboration.
